rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>That jingle's been stuck in my head ever
since I heard that Hudson Construction
started making <Color=red>dream homes<Color=white>.
Someday I hope I can make the trip east
to <Color=red>Tarrey Town <Color=white>and order a dream home
of my own.
<unk[3:0:268]>Meeting that special someone, settling
down in a nice, big house, and growing
gray together... <unk[5:1]>It's all I ever wanted!
<Size=125><unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>I'm smiling just imagining it!<Size=100>

rows.CNzh:
<Size=80><unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 49]>说起来……<unk[5:0]>我拜托了爸爸
装饰“结之钟”的画作来祈求结缘……
他到底有没有去准备呢……

要是邂逅不了出色的人，一切都没有意义，
希望爸爸能好好帮我这一把呢。<Size=100>
rows.TWzh:
<Size=80><unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 49]>對了……<unk[5:0]>之前為了結緣，
拜託爸爸幫忙掛上「結之鐘」的圖……
不知道準備得如何了……

首先得有個美好的邂逅，不然一切都沒有意義。
這裡就得請他好好盡些身為人父的本分了。<Size=100>
rows.JPja:
<Size=80><unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 49]>そういや…<unk[5:0]> パパに 『<Ruby={2:4}むす>結びの<Ruby={2:4}かね>鐘』の<Ruby={2:2}え>絵を<Ruby={2:4}かざ>飾って
<Ruby={4:8}えんむす>縁結びの<Ruby={2:4}げん>験を<Ruby={2:4}かつ>担ぐように お<Ruby={2:4}ねが>願いしたんだけど…
ちゃんと <Ruby={4:6}てはい>手配できたのかな…

まずは <Ruby={4:6}すてき>素敵な<Ruby={2:4}ひと>人と<Ruby={2:2}あ>会えないと <Ruby={4:4}いみ>意味ないんだから
そこは<Ruby={4:8}ちちおや>父親として <Ruby={4:6}がんば>頑張ってもらわないとね<Size=100>
rows.USen:
<Size=80><unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 49]>Of course, before I buy a home, I'll need to figure
out the "special someone" part of the equation.

I told Papa to put up a picture of the Unity Bell for
good luck in my dating life... I wonder if he's done it.

He's my father. Shouldn't he be doing his best to
help me find a partner who has kind eyes and knows
how to bake?<Size=100>

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>Anyway... You're interested in buying a
<Color=red>dream home<Color=white>, huh? Me too!

started a new service where they build

If you want to learn more, you should just
find them in <Color=red>Tarrey Town<Color=white>. That's to the
east of this stable.
Here's hoping we both end up in dream
homes of our own with amazing partners
who smell good and like dogs.
